TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Micista ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 19 buwan, 51 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 46 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 80%, Bunun 2%, saySiyat 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 6%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Micista hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Micista hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Micista hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Micista hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Micista hya' ga Ageq. tay mkyahu' na Micista hya' ga Uraw. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ miʦ~ʨis~ɕta ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βunun *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na miʦ~ʨis~ɕta ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na miʦ~ʨis~ɕta ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na miʦ~ʨis~ɕta ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na miʦ~ʨis~ɕta ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na miʦ~ʨis~ɕta ħjaʔ ɣa aɣeq. taj mkjaħuʔ na miʦ~ʨis~ɕta ħjaʔ ɣa uraw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Micista ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 19 buwan, 51 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 46 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 80%, Bunun 2%, saySiyat 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 6%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Micista hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Micista hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Micista hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Micista hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Micista hya' ga Ageq. tay mkyahu' na Micista hya' ga Uraw. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ miʦ~ʨis~ɕta ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βunun *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na miʦ~ʨis~ɕta ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na miʦ~ʨis~ɕta ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na miʦ~ʨis~ɕta ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na miʦ~ʨis~ɕta ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na miʦ~ʨis~ɕta ħjaʔ ɣa aɣeq. taj mkjaħuʔ na miʦ~ʨis~ɕta ħjaʔ ɣa uraw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
